description: Style NoteA unique blend of comfort and quality, this pair of track pants from nike score high on style as well.  Its  Dri-Fit quality pulls away sweat lets you work out for hours with total ease. Pair it with a short sleeved T-shirt and sneakers for a rigorous workout.Product DetailsBlack track pants, two front straight pockets, mesh pocket bag, Nike swoosh on left, panel at inseam, black panel with black piping at back, zipper on side -seam at bottom hem, elasticated waistband with drawstring, branding on inner waistbandMaterials and Care100% polyester Machine wash cold with like coloursDo not ironSize and FitLoose fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32”) is wearing a size M
